title: Repeated 'Regex.IsMatch' with an inline pattern should use a cached Regex
messageFormat: Cache a compiled 'Regex' instead of calling the static 'Regex.IsMatch' with an inline pattern.
summary: The static Regex.IsMatch overloads parse and build the pattern on every call. In a hot path or a loop that repeated work is wasted: the pattern is constant but the engine recompiles it each time.
Promoting the pattern to a shared Regex instance (optionally RegexOptions.Compiled) parses it once and reuses the automaton for every match.
